name: Timofei Bazhukov
description: Experienced SAP professional with 10+ years in technical leadership, SAP development, system integration, and cross-platform mobile app creation.

about.expertise: More than 10 years in SAP engineering roles, including senior and technical leadership positions. Deep expertise in SAP development, system integration, and fostering best coding practices within the SAP ecosystem.
about.technicalStack: Advanced skills in SAP technologies: SAP Fiori, SAPUI5, ABAP (transactions, enhancements), OData/SOAP web services, SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP), and database management including HANA and MongoDB.
about.currentFocus: Driving SAP governance, architecture, and cybersecurity initiatives, ensuring alignment with modern digital platform principles and enterprise standards.
about.mobileDevelopment: Experienced in developing cross-platform mobile applications with React Native, Flutter, and Node.js, published on both App Store and Google Play.
about.softSkills: Effective leader and collaborator, skilled in business analysis, project management, and technical architecture, with a strong background in Supply Chain and scalable solution design.

sapWorkExperience.details: Governing authority in SAP Product enablement, Architecture, Development, Cyber security, Access control, Integration/Extensibility, Automation, and Data Lifecycle Management. Proactively embracing the latest advancements in SAP technology aligned with company Digital Platform principles and Data Security governance. Designing and developing cutting-edge solutions that drive business success.
sapWorkExperience.technologies: SAP ecosystem and all connected to integration SAP with other applications technologies.

sapWorkExperience.details: Optimizing and governing the handling and maintenance of master data for the supply chain, enabling supply chain planning and execution according to the operating model, global and local requirements.
sapWorkExperience.technologies: ABAP Workbench, ABAP BTP environment, SAP Cloud Connector, RAP, CAP, Process Chains framework, Fiori, SAPUI5, CDS artifacts, ABAP Development tools for Eclipse, abapgit, OData, Web-services

sapWorkExperience.details: SAP Customer Conversion ensures that customer system are successfully converted from solution-builder based configuration content to the new X/4 server context.
sapWorkExperience.technologies: ABAP Workbench, ABAP OO, ABAP 7.5, Web-services, Solution Builder, IMG, BCS, ECATT.

sapWorkExperience.details: SAP ETD is a real-time Security Event Management and –Monitoring solution

ABAP Workbench, ABAP OO, ABAP 7.5, Web-services, OData via ABAP, CDS

nonSapWorkExperience.details: Support and development of the SAP SCM APO system implemented at the enterprise. Major Responsibilities: Developing custom applications in ABAP/4. Integration of SAP SCM and SAP ERP. Writing backend for ABAP microservices using architectures such as SOAP and REST. The project included: Technical support and refinement of existing solutions.
Development and support of the project on the .net platform. Major responsibilities: Development and improvement of the program for cashiers.
